exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your college selection forward
items: Create a comprehensive list of your academic interests, career goals, and non-negotiable requirements for your college experience
Research and document the admission requirements for 5-7 colleges that interest you
Schedule and attend college information sessions or campus tours for your top 3 target schools
Calculate the total cost of attendance for each college on your list, including tuition, fees, room and board, and estimated personal expenses
Meet with your high school counselor to review your academic transcript and discuss college readiness
Create a standardized test prep schedule and register for your first SAT or ACT exam
